_doc: Super Earth dispatch ACCOUNTS — the social 'handles' dispatches post from. GM-managed: the WarForge dispatch composer adds custom 'fake accounts' here, and the website feed (web-sample/fetch_map.py -> data/map.json) + the Discord embeds both read this file. icon = a ministry key with an SVG under assets/icons/ministries (and web-sample/img/ministries), or '' for a generated monogram avatar.

accounts.name: Ministry of Truth
accounts.bio: Official broadcasts of Super Earth. Only the truth, always.

accounts.name: Ministry of Defense
accounts.bio: Strategic command & the Helldiver corps. Deploy, citizen.

accounts.name: Ministry of Intelligence
accounts.bio: Eyes on every front. If you see something, report it.

accounts.name: Ministry of Science
accounts.bio: Progress through Managed Democracy. Results pending.

accounts.name: Ministry of Expansion
accounts.bio: New worlds for a free galaxy. The frontier is calling.

accounts.name: Ministry of Unity
accounts.bio: One people. One purpose. One Super Earth.

accounts.name: Ministry of Humanity
accounts.bio: For the welfare and morale of every loyal citizen.

accounts.name: Ministry of Prosperity
accounts.bio: Liberty is the best economy. Spend it freely.

accounts.name: Ministry of Employment
accounts.bio: Your contract is your privilege. Terms are final.
